Take to the skies with the Blue Bombers! As Bowie Stray, you'll lead a squadron of pilots through high-speed dogfights, master responsive on-rails combat, and uncover the secrets of a world under siege. From Chuhai Labs, Wild Blue Skies is the definitive modern evolution of the classic arcade rail-shooter.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Project Songbird - Physical Edition Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016429

The critically acclaimed Appalachian psychological horror thriller is coming to your shelf! We are thrilled to announce that Project Songbird is officially launching in a physical edition for PlayStation 5 later this year. Experience the intensely personal tale of Dakota, a struggling musician who retreats to an isolated cabin deep in the Appalachian forest to record a new album. As you scour the pines for inspiration, you will soon discover that a malicious presence lurks in the darkness, proving that some creative processes carry a deadly cost.

Game Key Features:
- A Gripping Psychological Narrative: Experience a dark, 4-5 hour surreal horror tale that explores the heavy tolls of creativity.
- Cinematic Presentation: Traverse detailed environments that shift from serene natural landscapes into nightmarish, reality-bending locations.
- Desperate Survival Combat: Engage in heart-pounding ranged and melee combat with upgradeable weapons.
- An All-Star Voice Cast: Starring Valerie Rose Lohman (What Remains of Edith Finch), Jonah Scott (Dying Light 2), and Aleks Le (Persona 3: Reload).
- Haunting Original Soundtrack: Features an eerie score performed by members of the band Auric Echoes.

#ps5 #ps5games #projectsongbird

Lizards Must Die 2 - Console Announcement Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018277

LIZARDS MUST DIE 2 is a coop slasher game from the LEGENDARY theBratans team, aka SMOLA GAMES, developer of the LIZARDS MUST DIE franchise.

The deservedly un-award-winning franchise returns with a brand new, REVOLUTIONARY chapter.

The vile lizards, driven by their SECRET PATRONS, received NEW LIZARD TECHNOLOGIES and again insidiously attacked the lands of the RUS. HYPERBOREA is on fire, Baikal is polluted by FACTORIES for the production of lizard machines and only GLORIOUS HEROES can destroy all the damned invaders and drive them away.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
UN:Me - Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
Coming in 2026, UN:Me is a psychological adventure game in which you guide a girl carrying multiple souls within her body through an unsettling mental labyrinth. Engage in dialogue with each soul she harbors, then face the harrowing choice of which to keep, and which to erase, as you fight to escape.

・Genre: Soul Triage Adventure
・Number of players: Single-player
・Language: English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese
・Planning & Scenario: Takuya Yamanaka
・Planning & Development: historia Inc.
・Publisher: SHUEISHA GAMES

©SHUEISHA,SHUEISHA GAMES developed by historia

text:
Gravity Circuit 2 - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019674

Once again, the Gravity Circuit, finds himself facing an unstoppable force. But this time, he's not alone. Choose Gravity or Power Circuit in this action-packed 2D platformer inspired by console classics.

GRAVITY CIRCUIT 2, the sequel to the critically acclaimed Gravity Circuit IS COMING in 2027 🤖 Wishlist now: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019674

What is Gravity Circuit 2 about?
A new Ark has risen. Play as one of two adept fighters, Gravity and Power Circuit, in this action-packed 2D platformer inspired by console classics. Gravity Circuit 2 is the sequel to the critically acclaimed Gravity Circuit.

Gravity Circuit 2 is developed by Domesticated Ant Games and published by Dear Villagers

#ps5 #ps5games #2dplatformer #indiegame #playstation

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
State of Play | June 2, 2026 [English Subtitles]
State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 with more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. 

To kick things off, you’ll get a closer look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will share more from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some new details. This all-new take on the comic book legend launches on PS5 September 15.

Watch the State of Play broadcast live Tuesday, June 2 at 2:00pm PT / 5:00pm ET / 11:00pm CEST | June 3 at 6:00am JST on YouTube and Twitch. The broadcast will be in English, with Japanese subtitles also available. We hope to see you then!

Regarding co-streaming and video-on-demand (VOD)

Please note that this broadcast may include copyrighted content (e.g. licensed music) that Sony Interactive Entertainment does not control. We welcome and celebrate our amazing co-streamers and creators, but licensing agreements outside our control could interfere with co-streams or VOD archives of this broadcast. If you’re planning to save this broadcast as a VOD to create recap videos, or to repost clips or segments from the show, we advise omitting any copyrighted music.

FlexStrike Wireless Fight Stick - Design Story
https://www.playstation.com/accessories/flexstrike-wireless-fight-stick/

Join the fray at home or away with the FlexStrike™ wireless fight stick, featuring a built-in rechargeable battery, ultra-low latency response, and a sling carry case.

PC compatibility for FlexStrike wireless fight stick will roll out following launch, with availability expanding to more users over time.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
27" Gaming Monitor with DualSense Charging Hook - Features Trailer | PlayStation
https://www.playstation.com/accessories/27-inch-gaming-monitor/

Play-Ready Desktop Gaming™

Always be ready to play on a 27" Gaming Monitor with DualSense® Charging Hook from PlayStation®.

Featuring a QHD screen with HDR visuals*, refresh rates up to 240 Hz* with VRR support* for smooth gameplay, and a convenient DualSense® wireless controller charging hook to keep you ready for action anytime. Further customize your setup by connecting a PlayStation Link™ adapter and other accessories via multiple USB connections** to ensure your gaming space is always ready for play.

DualSense® wireless controller sold separately.

Design and specifications are subject to change.

Available from August 27, 2026, while supplies last from direct.playstation.com (U.S. only) and select retailers in the U.S. and Japan.

Learn more at blog.playstation.com

*Features available with compatible devices and supported games, sold separately. Supports a refresh rate of up to 120 Hz when connected to a PS5 console.

**The USB port functions as a hub and does not provide standalone functionality. A compatible device must be connected via the USB Type-B port for proper operation.

#playstation #ps5
